class FenwickTree {
    private var tree: [Int]
    private let size: Int
    
    init(size: Int) {
        self.size = size
        self.tree = [Int](repeating: 0, count: size + 1)
    }

        while i <= size {
            tree[i] += delta
            i += i & -i
        }

    func query(_ index: Int) -> Int {
        var sum = 0

        while i > 0 {
            sum += tree[i]
            i -= i & -i
        }
        return sum
    }
    
    func rangeQuery(_ l: Int, _ r: Int) -> Int {
        return query(r) - query(l - 1)
    }
}

    private var tree: [Int]
    private let size: Int
    
    init(size: Int) {
        self.size = size
        self.tree = [Int](repeating: 0, count: size + 1)
    }
    
    func update(_ index: Int, _ delta: Int) {
        var i = index
        while i <= size {
            tree[i] += delta
            i += i & -i
        }
    }
    
    func query(_ index: Int) -> Int {
        var sum = 0
        var i = index
        while i > 0 {
            sum += tree[i]
            i -= i & -i
        }
        return sum
    }
    
    func rangeQuery(_ l: Int, _ r: Int) -> Int {
        return query(r) - query(l - 1)
    }
}
